message:
refactor(codegen): Add binop_dispatch helper and use in async_state_machine

- Create helpers/binop_dispatch.zig with getSpecialBinOpCall()
- Consolidate Mod/Pow/FloorDiv dispatch logic into single location
- Update 4 binop locations in async_state_machine.zig to use helper
- Reduces ~60 lines of duplicated operator dispatch code
